security_signals.description: Every vulnerability, advisory, or security-relevant finding in this document

vulnerability_id.description: CVE or advisory identifier if stated, e.g. CVE-2026-12345

affected_component.description: The component, package, or dependency affected

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the vulnerability and its impact

remediation.description: Recommended fix or mitigation if stated

source_context.description: Where in the document this appears: section heading or page area
